student.name: Rahul Kumar
student.lead_source: Downloaded JEE prep guide from PW website

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, am I speaking with Rahul Kumar? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah. I noticed you Downloaded JEE prep guide from PW website — wanted to reach out and see how I can help.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Oh hi! Haan main Rahul bol raha hun. Actually main JEE prep guide download kiya tha because I'm really serious about my JEE preparation. Aap call kar rahe ho to perfect timing hai!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's wonderful Rahul! I'm so glad you're taking your JEE prep seriously. Tell me, which class mein ho aap right now?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Main Class 12 mein hun. Actually main bahut excited hun about JEE prep. Main daily 8-10 hours padhta hun but I feel like I need proper guidance and structure. PW ke baare mein bahut suna hai!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent dedication Rahul! Class 12 mein ho to JEE Main kab hai tumhara? And are you targeting JEE Main ya Advanced bhi?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: JEE Main is just 3 months away! Main primarily JEE Main focus kar raha hun. I've heard PW has amazing courses for JEE. Can you tell me about the different batches available? Main chahta hun ki proper coaching mil jaye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect! 3 months mein with right guidance, you can definitely crack it. For JEE Main, humara JEE Arjuna 2027 batch perfect hai for you - it's specifically designed for focused preparation. 19,999 rupees mein complete course milta hai with all study materials.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: 19,999 rupees sounds reasonable! But tell me more about what exactly is included in this Arjuna batch? Main detail mein jaanna chahta hun - like faculty kaun hai, study material kya milega, doubt clearing sessions hain ya nahi?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great question! Arjuna batch mein you get live classes by top IIT faculty, complete study material with DPPs, regular mock tests, and 24x7 doubt clearing support. Plus recorded lectures bhi mil jaate hain for revision. Budget wise koi concern hai ya parents se discuss karna hoga?

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Budget is not a major concern for me. Main apna decision le sakta hun. But ek aur question hai - kya crash course type ka intensive preparation hoga since only 3 months left hain? And can I start immediately?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely! Since you have 3 months, it will be intensive crash course format with focused strategy. You can start immediately after enrollment. EMI option bhi hai - 1,999 rupees per month through PW Pay with 0% interest. Bahut affordable ho jaata hai.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: That sounds perfect! Main actually ready hun to enroll. I want to enroll in Arjuna batch - how do I proceed? Kya process hai enrollment ka? And when can I access the classes?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Fantastic Rahul! I'm so excited for your journey. Enrollment ke liye main aapko payment link send kar deti hun. You can pay full amount ya EMI choose kar sakte ho. Classes access immediately mil jaayega after payment confirmation.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Perfect! Please send me the payment link. Main full payment kar dunga today itself. Also, kya mobile app hai PW ka? And will I get any welcome kit ya study materials courier se?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, PW app hai - very user friendly. Study materials physical bhi courier se aayenge within 3-4 days. Let me take your address for that. And I'll WhatsApp you the payment link right now along with batch details.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Excellent! My address is A-block, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi - 110024. Priya, thank you so much for this call. Main bahut confident feel kar raha hun about my preparation now. When will classes start exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect address noted! Classes start from tomorrow morning 9 AM. You'll get complete schedule on the app. Rahul, I'm confident you'll do amazingly well. All the best for your JEE preparation! Payment link bhej rahi hun abhi.

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Thank you so much Priya! This was exactly what I needed. Main payment kar dunga within an hour and will start classes tomorrow. Really excited about this journey with PhysicsWallah!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful Rahul! Welcome to the PW family. Any doubts ya questions ho to feel free to call back. My number is 9 8 1 0 7 6 5 4 3 2. All the very best for your JEE preparation. You've got this!

transcript.speaker: student
transcript.text: Perfect! Thank you so much Priya. Main definitely call karunga if any questions aayenge. See you in the classes tomorrow. Bye!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Bye Rahul! Looking forward to seeing your success story. Take care and happy studying!

promised_actions: Send course details and enrollment link

slack_message.preview: 🔥 HOT lead: Rahul Kumar, JEE Main, Class 12, Delhi. High intent, ready to enroll. Immediate callback recommended.

email.subject: Your JEE Main Preparation Plan — PhysicsWallah
email.preview: Hi Rahul, it was great speaking with you today! Based on your preparation goals, I've put together a personalized plan for your JEE Main journey.

crm_record.lead_source: Downloaded JEE prep guide from PW website
crm_record.notes: High engagement, self decision-maker. Likely to convert with one follow-up call.
